display.purpose: Major page titles and prominent hero text.

shadows.name: elevated
shadows.purpose: Used for popovers, modals, and deep hover interactions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main actionable button. Used sparingly.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.205 0 0); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); padding: 8px 16px; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; border: none; border-radius: 8px; transition: opacity 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; }

components.name: Input Field
components.css: .ds-input { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); padding: 8px 12px; font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 8px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.708 0 0); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Quiet container for notes or tasks.
components.html:
Make doctors appointment

Call Dr. Smith at 555-0123
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); padding: 24px; font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 10px; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-weight: 500; font-size: 18px; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); font-size: 16px; }

narrative.northStar: A calm, trusted vantage point for your work and thoughts
narrative.overview:
Horizon is designed as a calm place to think. It values clarity over density, consistency over customization, and confidence over cleverness. The interface should quietly organize complexity rather than hide it, helping users regain perspective and move forward deliberately.

It functions as a foundation for capturing information quickly, reviewing it, managing actionable work, and executing daily commitments without getting in the user's way.

It explicitly rejects complex PKM systems, extensive project management paradigms, over-automation, and unnecessary decorative clutter.

rules.name: The Content First Rule
rules.body: The interface itself is grayscale so that user content can be the only source of true color. Do not use color for decoration, only for semantic meaning (like destructive actions).

rules.name: The Legibility Rule
rules.body: Body text should never be smaller than 16px. Optimize for long-term readability by adjusting line height and spacing appropriately.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, modals).

dos: Do use the Zinc & Paper palette to keep the UI unobtrusive and neutral.
Do ensure all text hits a strong contrast ratio (e.g. Primary Ink on Page Background).
Do use borders for structure instead of shadows for resting states.
donts: Don't use complex PKM paradigms like knowledge graphs, backlinks, or analytics dashboards.
Don't use neon accents, glassmorphism, or heavy drop shadows.
Don't use color purely for decoration.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe.
